{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Starhammer's appearance
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Starhammer]] has a gold-and-white uniform and a titanium skull with a camera lens for an eye.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
